wins: U.S. business achieved 44% year-over-year revenue growth
U.S. government business revenue growth accelerated to 40% year-over-year
U.S. commercial business momentum continued with 54% year-over-year revenue growth

risks: International commercial revenue declined 7% sequentially due to headwinds in Europe
